message:
fix(fcp-raptorq): fix decode cancellation race and correct signature test

decode.rs: After exhausting symbols without successful decode, yield to
the executor and check for cancellation before reporting InsufficientSymbols.
Catch InsufficientSymbols in the outer match when context was cancelled
concurrently, preventing misreported symbol shortage on cancellation.

codec/decoder.rs: Remove incorrect test that force-overwrote sig_b
fingerprint to equal sig_a. The test now correctly asserts different
equation sets produce different signatures. Reformat cache.insert().

fcp-async-core: Rewrite next_line() using map_or idiom, add Errors
doc section, reformat raptorq decoder re-export.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
